name: Fox Den Indoor Golf
about: Fox Den Indoor Golf is a facility located in downtown Lancaster, PA, equipped with four TrackMan simulators. The venue is designed for both serious golfers seeking data-rich feedback and social groups looking for a relaxed, no-dress-code environment. It offers consistent weather conditions and real-time swing analysis to improve one's game. The space accommodates various booking options, from individual practice to large group events, with pricing based on hourly bay rentals and league packages.
why_golfers_like_it: Real-time data-rich feedback from premium Trackman technology
No dress code or tee time stress for a relaxed social experience
BYOB policy allowing guests to bring their own beverages
Accurate launch monitor data to improve every aspect of the swing

food_and_drink.notes: Guests are welcome to bring their own food.
BYOB (Bring Your Own Beverage) policy is in effect.

simulator_hardware.notes: Newest technology with an overhead sensor and impact camera for the most seamless simulator experience.
Industry leader for over a decade, used by professionals and broadcasters, providing extensive actionable data.

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: The venue offers rental clubs, but players are also welcome to bring their own.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: Yes, the venue is BYOB (Bring Your Own Beverage) and guests can bring their own food to enjoy during their session.

faq.question: How long should I book for an 18-hole round?
faq.answer: A general rule of thumb is 1 hour per player for a full 18-hole round.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, the indoor golf space is designed to be accessible and welcoming for all, including families and those new to the game.
